def positive_asyncio_queue_created_without_maxsize_in_producer_path():
    rule_id = "asyncio_queue_created_without_maxsize_in_producer_path"
    family = "architecture"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "asyncio.Queue created without maxsize on a producer code path, allowing unbounded memory growth."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
